children.heading: Authority
children.label: a Authority
children.text: Subject to the availability of appropriations, the Secretary may make available to lenders for a project meeting the eligibility criteria established in loan guarantees to supplement private-sector or lender financing for the project.section 2422 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Loan guarantees under this section for a project shall be on such terms and conditions and contain such covenants, representations, warranties, and requirements as the Secretary determines to be appropriate to protect the financial interests of the United States.

children.heading: Amount
children.label: 2 Amount
children.text: Loan guarantees by the Secretary shall not exceed an amount equal to 90 percent of the cost of the project that is the subject of the loan guarantee, as estimated at the time at which the loan guarantee is issued.

children.heading: Interest rate
children.label: 3 Interest rate
children.text: An obligation shall bear interest at a rate that does not exceed a level that the Secretary determines to be appropriate, taking into account the prevailing rate of interest in the private sector for similar loans and risks.

children.heading: Amortization
children.label: 4 Amortization
children.text: A loan guarantee under this section shall provide for complete amortization of the loan guarantee within not more than 40 years.

children.heading: Nonsubordination
children.label: 5 Nonsubordination
children.text: An obligation shall be subject to the condition that the obligation is not subordinate to other financing.

children.heading: Prepayment and refinancing
children.label: c Prepayment and refinancing
children.text: Any prepayment or refinancing terms on a loan guarantee shall be negotiated between the non-Federal borrower and the lender with the consent of the Secretary.
